title: Connections, Channels, Heartbeats, Errors, and Recovery · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A messaging pairing room predicts publisher, exchange, queue, consumer, ownership, and failure transitions before assembling the first connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine for connections, channels, heartbeats, errors, and recovery. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost.
Assign channel ownership by publisher or consumer lifecycle and prevent concurrent confirm, acknowledgement, and topology operations from corrupting assumptions.
Choose a heartbeat timeout with network and flow-control evidence and distinguish heartbeat interval, TCP keepalive, and false-positive failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Long Lived Connection
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop messaging team handles case 3329 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound heartbeat and reconnect policy while rejecting stale channel-generation callbacks; retain duplicate-safe identity through every ambiguous handoff; then reuse one message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Long Lived Connection.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use bounded long-lived amqp connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, tls, and lifecycle cost. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Long Lived Connection, keep Long Lived Connection connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
